speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: Personal information
speaking.sampleAnswer: My name is Linh. I am twenty years old. I am Vietnamese. I am a student. My address is in Hanoi.

speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: Family
questions: Do you have a big family?
Are you close to your brother or sister?
speaking.sampleAnswer: I don't have a big family. My father is a doctor and my mother is a nurse. I have one sister. We are very close.
